LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS TAL KLEMENT, CARMEN AGUIRRE, MICHELLE TONG AND CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN TEN DAYS; THE PARTIES PLEADINGS DO NOT ESTABLISH AS A MATTER OF LAW WHETHER PLAINTIFF HAS BEEN EXONERATED.
